text: You can have it. What do you want? Spaghetti? Okay. Here's some spaghetti. Which one do you want? Spaghetti? Okay. Here's some spaghetti. You're doing it, dude. Which one do you want? Oh, spaghetti? Okay. There you go. Nice job. When if we switch the placement, yeah. Here. Check them out. Which one do you want? Broccoli? Oh, you want some broccoli? I see you don't want any broccoli. Do you want broccoli or spaghetti? I thought you were going to say spaghetti. Which one do you want?
